data.title: Analysts Project $10–$15 Range in Qubetics Price Prediction 2026 After ATH of $4.20 in First Hour
data.description:
Could Qubetics be on track to join the ranks of crypto’s most valuable Layer 1s? The Qubetics price prediction 2026 is currently set between $10 and $15 by analysts, and that forecast is looking increasingly credible. Within just one hour of its listing, Qubetics surged from $0. 40 to a staggering $4. 20, marking a 950% or. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/analysts-project-10-15-range-in-qubetics-price-prediction-2026-after-ath-of-4-20-in-first-hour/

data.title: Galaxy Digital-Backed AllUnity Secures MiCA License To Drive Stablecoin Growth
data.description:
AllUnity, a joint venture backed by Galaxy Digital, has received an E-Money Institution (EMI) license from BaFin. This license from the German Federal Financial Supervisory Authority (BaFin) offers AllUnity a path for stablecoin growth. Galaxy Digital-Backed AllUnity to Launch a Euro-Backed Stablecoin Galaxy Digital CEO Mike Novogratz gave the announcement in an X post
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/07/03/galaxy-digital-backed-allunity-secures-mica-license-to-drive-stablecoin-growth/

data.title: Eclipse opens ES airdrop query, ASC series NFT holders will directly receive airdrops
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Ethereum SVM Layer2 network Eclipse posted on the X platform that the ES airdrop query page is now online. In addition, After School Club posted on social media that users holding ASC series NFTs will directly receive ES airdrops on the day of Eclipse TGE, without snapshots or additional operations. If you hold ASC in your wallet, the airdrop will be automatically distributed to your wallet address.

data.description:
House Republicans are coordinating a legislative blitz to reshape U. S. crypto regulation and block future state-issued digital currencies.
source: https://decrypt.co/328567/house-gop-crypto-week-advance-landmark-digital-asset-bills

data.title: DeFi TVL breaks above $116B as lending roars back
data.description:
The DeFi market has rebounded at the beginning of July, with total value locked (TVL) rising to $116. 416 billion, a level last seen in April. The 24-hour increase of 4. 95% reflects rising crypto asset prices and renewed deposit flows into lending protocols, restaking services, and yield-bearing primitives
source: https://cryptoslate.com/defi-tvl-breaks-above-116b-as-lending-roars-back/

data.title: Ethereum-backed stocks are booming – Here’s what’s fueling the surge
data.description:
The Ethereum spot ETF inflows have begun to climb higher since June, reflecting increased investor confidence.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/ethereum-backed-stocks-are-booming-heres-whats-fueling-the-surge/

data.title: A whale completed a profit-taking operation on 723 WBTC, with a cumulative profit of more than 49.75 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @EmberCN monitoring, a whale/institutional address that purchased a total of 1,495 WBTC from July to November 2024 through a revolving loan has recently sold WBTC on Binance and withdrawn USDC for repayment. So far, the address has sold 723 WBTC, with an average selling price of approximately US$95,678, and recovered 69.17 million USDC. It still holds approximately 753.8 WBTC (approximately US$82.6 million), with a total floating and realized profit of approximately US$49.75 million.

data.title: House GOP announces crypto week in Mid-July to review key bills
data.description:
The US House GOP has designated the week of July 14 as "Crypto Week" to focus on key cryptocurrency legislation.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/house-gop-announces-crypto-week-in-mid-july/

data.title: SEC suddenly suspends GDLC's listing application, Grayscale says it will still push forward with crypto ETF conversion plan
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News After the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) unexpectedly halted the listing process of Grayscale Digital Large Market Fund (GDLC), Grayscale said it would still be committed to promoting the fund's conversion into an exchange-traded product (ETP). The fund is composed of about 80% Bitcoin, 11% Ethereum, and a small amount of SOL, ADA, and XRP, and has been accelerated. Analysts believe that the SEC's move is intended to establish a unified listing framework for the overall crypto ETF, or pave the way for subsequent spot ETFs such as SOL and DOGE. (The Block)

data.title: EU and US Aim for Tariff Accord Amid Potential Trade Tensions
data.description:
The EU seeks a tariff agreement with the US by July 9, amid concerns over potential trade tensions and market impacts.
source: https://coincu.com/346708-eu-us-tariff-agreement-2025

data.title: US Senators Submit Standalone Crypto Tax Bill to End Double Taxation and Clarify Staking Mining Tax Rules
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News US Senator Cynthia Lummis drafted and submitted an independent crypto tax bill, proposing to exempt digital asset trading income of no more than $300 per transaction and no more than $5,000 per year, and postpone the taxation of pledge and mining rewards to the time when the assets are sold. In addition, the bill also intends to exempt crypto lending agreements and charitable donation-related assets from tax obligations. She said that the bill will provide a reasonable and clear tax framework for digital economy participants, avoid unintentional violations, and promote the modernization of US crypto legislation. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: The U.S. House of Representatives will establish "Crypto Week" in mid-July to promote three pieces of legislation, including the GENIUS Stablecoin Act
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News The Republican Party of the U.S. House of Representatives announced that the week of July 14 will be designated as "Cryptocurrency Week", focusing on reviewing three key crypto legislation, including the GENIUS Stablecoin Act passed by the Senate, the market structure bill "Clarity", and proposals against central bank digital currencies (CBDCs). This move is aimed at promoting the Trump administration's digital asset agenda and strive to complete legislative delivery by August. The GENIUS Act requires stablecoins to be fully backed by liquid assets such as the U.S. dollar, and stipulates that issuers with a market value of more than $50 billion must be audited annually. This agenda is seen as an important node for the comprehensive clarification of U.S. crypto policies. (The Block)

data.title: Kidnap Plot Against Crypto Billionaire Fails After Brutal Encounter
data.description:
Australian crypto entrepreneur Tim Heath narrowly escaped abduction after reportedly biting off part of an attacker’s finger during a confrontation […] The post Kidnap Plot Against Crypto Billionaire Fails After Brutal Encounter appeared first on Coindoo.
source: https://coindoo.com/kidnap-plot-against-crypto-billionaire-fails-after-brutal-encounter/

data.title: Ondo Finance and Pantera Capital launch $250 million fund
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Ondo Finance and Pantera Capital jointly established the $250 million Ondo Catalyst Fund, which aims to invest in RWA tokenization projects, covering equity and tokens. Ondo's chief strategy officer said that the current market has entered the "tokenization arms race" stage, and exchanges are accelerating the layout of tokenized stocks and ETF products. The fund simultaneously promotes the construction of on-chain financial infrastructure, and OKX Wallet has joined its global market alliance. RedStone data shows that the RWA market has grown 380% since 2022 to $24 billion, and the growth momentum comes from private credit and U.S. debt tokenization. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: ZachXBT: WhiteRock founder arrested in UAE for alleged ZKasino scam and extradited to the Netherlands
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto Detective ZachXBT posted on the X platform that Ildar Ilham, the founder of WhiteRock Finance, has been detained in the UAE and will be extradited to the Netherlands for his alleged $30 million fraud in the ZKasino project. ZKasino was launched in April 2024 and promised to airdrop native tokens, but user funds have not been returned so far. Previously, the Dutch police had arrested Elham Nourzai, who was suspected of manipulating the project. Ilham's arrest this time is believed to be directly related to the case. After the news was released, WhiteRock's native token WHITE plummeted by more than 40%. (cointelegraph)

data.title: Analysts Predict Major Dogecoin Price Rally After Breaking 50-Day Trendline
data.description:
The Dogecoin price may be setting up for a significant rally as a technical analyst identifies a bullish breakout above the 50-day trendline. After months of compressed price action, the meme coin now appears poised to conclude its downtrend, igniting fresh optimism within the crypto community. Dogecoin Price Set For Game-Changing Rally Trader Tardigrade, a crypto market analyst, announced in an X (formerly Twitter) post on July 1 that the Dogecoin price has just broken above a critical 50-day descending trendline on its daily chart. With this new development, the analyst anticipates the potential start of a powerful upward price movement soon
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/dogecoin/dogecoin-break-50-day-trendline/

data.title: ‘Super Majority’ of Bitcoin Holders Sitting on $1,200,000,000,000 in Profits: Analytics Firm Glassnode
data.description:
The crypto analytics firm Glassnode says most Bitcoin (BTC) holders are now seeing substantial gains in their investments. In a new report, Glassnode says that “a super-majority of Bitcoin investors” are currently holding unrealized profits following the flagship cryptocurrency’s recovery to $107,000. Holders now have an average paper gain of 125%
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/07/03/super-majority-of-bitcoin-holders-sitting-on-1200000000000-in-profits-analytics-firm-glassnode/

data.title: U.S. House to Review Key Cryptocurrency Legislation
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the U.S. House Republican leadership announced plans to review three significant cryptocurrency-related bills during the week of July 14. These include the GENIUS Stablecoin Act, which has already been passed by the Senate, the Digital Asset Market Structure Clarity Act, and a proposal to restrict the Federal Reserve from issuing a central bank digital currency.

Notably, although the House had previously drafted its own stablecoin legislation, known as the STABLE Act, it will prioritize the Senate-approved version of the GENIUS Act to expedite the legislative process.

The Digital Asset Market Structure Clarity Act aims to delineate the regulatory responsibilities of the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) concerning cryptocurrencies, while also enhancing investor protection requirements.
